mapper.sql: ur.id, ur.user_id, ur.room_id, ur.seat_id, ur.reservation_id, ur.lease_id, ur.start_time, ur.end_time, ur.duration, ur.type, ur.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM usage_record ur LEFT JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON ur.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON ur.seat_id = s.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ur.start_time DESC

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM usage_record ur LEFT JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON ur.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON ur.seat_id = s.id ORDER BY ur.start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO usage_record (user_id, room_id, seat_id, reservation_id, lease_id, start_time, end_time, duration, type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roomId}, #{seatId}, #{reservationId}, #{leaseId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{type})
mapper.select: SELECT ur.id, ur.user_id, ur.room_id, ur.reservation_id, ur.lease_id, ur.start_time, ur.end_time, ur.duration, ur.type, ur.create_time FROM usage_record ur WHERE ur.reservation_id = #{reservationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, SUM(duration) as minutes FROM usage_record WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(end_time), '-W', LPAD(WEEK(end_time, 1), 2, '0')) as date, SUM(duration) as minutes FROM usage_record WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY YEAR(end_time), WEEK(end_time, 1) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m') as date, SUM(duration) as minutes FROM usage_record WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT ur.user_id as userId, COALESCE(u.username, '') as username, COALESCE(u.real_name, '') as realName, COALESCE(SUM(ur.duration), 0) as minutes FROM usage_record ur LEFT JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE ur.end_time IS NOT NULL AND ur.end_time >= #{startTime} AND ur.end_time <= #{endTime} AND ur.duration IS NOT NULL AND ur.duration > 0 GROUP BY ur.user_id, u.username, u.real_name HAVING minutes > 0 ORDER BY minutes DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT HOUR(end_time) as hour, SUM(duration) as minutes FROM usage_record WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY HOUR(end_time) ORDER BY hour ASC

SELECT FROM usage_record ur WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.start_time IS NOT NULL AND ur.end_time IS NOT NULL AND ur.type = 1 AND ( (ur.start_time >= #{startTime} AND ur.start_time <= #{endTime}) OR (ur.end_time >= #{startTime} AND ur.end_time <= #{endTime}) OR (ur.start_time <= #{startTime} AND ur.end_time >= #{endTime}) ) ORDER BY ur.start_time ASC

SELECT FROM usage_record ur WHERE ur.start_time IS NOT NULL AND ur.end_time IS NOT NULL AND ur.type = 1 AND ( (ur.start_time >= #{startTime} AND ur.start_time <= #{endTime}) OR (ur.end_time >= #{startTime} AND ur.end_time <= #{endTime}) OR (ur.start_time <= #{startTime} AND ur.end_time >= #{endTime}) ) ORDER BY ur.start_time ASC
